title: A Tortoise Approach for US Nuclear Research and Development
summary: In Aesop's fable, a swift hare races with a deliberate tortoise. In the end, the tortoise wins by taking a slow and steady approach. The authors argue that, given the economic constraints on US deployment of nuclear power, a "tortoise strategy" is more prudent for US government nuclear R&D efforts.
body: Summary This article appeared in the Comment section of Nature Energy . In Aesop's fable, a swift hare races with a deliberate tortoise. In the end, the tortoise wins by taking a slow and steady approach. The authors argue that, given the economic constraints on US deployment of nuclear power, a "tortoise strategy" is more prudent for US government nuclear R&D efforts. The latest from Belfer See more Recommended citation Ford, Michael J. and Daniel Schrag. "A Tortoise Approach for US Nuclear Research and Development." Nature Energy , July 30, 2018.
